### Nicholas Tang

Resume: [PDF](https://github.com/nicholas-tangerine/resume/blob/main/resume.pdf)    \
Email: [tangnicholas26@gmail.com](mailto:tangnicholas26@gmail.com)                  \
Phone: +1 (925) 660-5921                                                            \

I classify myself as a C programmer, music nerd, and battery chemistry enthusiast   \

## About
* Incoming SWE Intern at Rivian and Volkswagen Group Technologies for Charging
* (No Formal Title) ECE Lab
    + Designing PCB for minimal breakout board for TI's C2000 (Altium)
* Formula Slug, FSAE @ UCSC
